summary: v1.4 complete: bell repositioned to top header (x=1854, panel visible at x=1568), USD equivalent visible on public /q/{token} ('≈ $1,809.17 USD (TC 17.193)'), free navigation between all 5 builder steps without data loss, Spanish DD MMM YYYY (06 JUL 2026) shown in builder helper, Review, Kanban, Quotation Detail and Public page, auto-checkout (Mon 06 JUL + 3 nights = 09 JUL), extra-nights box with cost+unit selector (per_person × 2 nights × 2 pax × $800 = $3,200 MXN — exactly matches backend pricing), start-day warning shows on Wed and disappears on Mon for Guadalajara (allowed_start_days=[0,3]), service unit labels visible (por persona/grupo/día/acceso), default quantities computed correctly (per_access ×2 pax, per_day ×3 nights, per_person ×2 pax, per_group ×1) and rendered on PublicQuotation public-services breakdown. Backend regression suite 4/4 PASS.
critical_code_review_comments: QuotationBuilder.jsx getting heavy (522 lines). Consider extracting step panels (ClientStep, PackageStep, DatesStep, ServicesStep, ReviewStep) into focused subcomponents — easier to maintain and unit test.

/app/frontend/src/lib/dates.js formatDateEs builds the date from string slicing (good — avoids tz drift), but addDays() uses new Date()+setDate then toISOString which depends on UTC; on environments behind UTC this could shift the date by 1 day. Currently OK because the constructor uses 'T00:00:00' (local midnight) and setDate rolls correctly, but consider an explicit Date.UTC path for safety.

PublicQuotation only shows USD equivalent when payment.currency==='MXN' — fine for current single-currency tenant, but adding a small fallback (`payment.total_usd_equivalent != null`) would future-proof against multi-currency tenants.

Free-step navigation in QuotationBuilder lets the user jump to Revisión with incomplete data (no client/package/dates). The submit button validation will still catch this, but consider disabling the submit button (or showing per-section badges) until all required steps are complete to avoid an opaque failure.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — every spec'd flow verified visually and programmatically

seed_data_creation: Created 2 quotations during testing: 297604f1-94bf-4f43-8502-57159c3e5f3e (COT-2026031, Guadalajara, 5 nights with 2 extra @ $800/per_person, +2 services, total $31,105.25 MXN). Token Cuo-uf70spgXeOTENVJNy9AH still valid 7 days. Plus 2 TEST_ quotations from backend pytest (notes='TEST_extra_nights' and 'TEST_usd'). No catalog/seed changes; cleanup not required.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://neto-a-publico.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7_v14.py -v (expect 4/4). Frontend builder test_ids: client-option-{uuid}, package-option-{code}, hotel-option-{name}, service-toggle-{id}, date-start, date-end, extra-night-cost, extra-night-unit, extra-nights-subtotal, start-day-warning. Public token of last created quotation: Cuo-uf70spgXeOTENVJNy9AH. To pick weekday-specific dates: 2026-07-06=Mon, 2026-07-07=Tue, 2026-07-08=Wed, 2026-07-09=Thu. Guadalajara seeded allowed_start_days=[0,3] (Mon,Thu). Note PDF generation was not exercised by Playwright; backend pricing already validated via pytest so PDF visual is the only remaining manual verification.
rca of the issue: No regressions found. All v1.4 specs implemented correctly. Notable confirmations: (1) per_person extra-night formula = extra_nights × total_pax × cost — matches both frontend display and backend pricing.py. (2) Public endpoint /api/public/quotations/{token} returns payment.total_usd_equivalent=1809.17 with rate_mxn_per_usd=17.193 for an MXN base quotation of $31,105.25 — math checks out (31105.25 / 17.193 ≈ 1809.17). (3) Spanish month abbreviations correctly used in formatDateEs (ENE..DIC array) and rendered everywhere required.
